CLab_1-General_ResetAll.name: Reset all settings to defaults
CLab_1-General_ResetAll.tooltip: ⚠️ Warning: toggling this immediately resets all CLab settings to factory defaults.

CLab_1-General_Shortcut.name: Keyboard shortcut
CLab_1-General_Shortcut.tooltip: Supports combinations, e.g. C, Shift+C, Ctrl+M, Alt+X (case-insensitive)

CLab_1-General_BackdropBlur.name: Enable backdrop blur
CLab_1-General_BackdropBlur.tooltip: Adds a glass-style backdrop; on weaker GPUs, dragging the panel may stutter.

CLab_1-General_BgOpacity.name: Panel background opacity (%)
CLab_1-General_BgOpacity.tooltip: Main panel background transparency (0 = fully transparent, 100 = solid).

CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_MaxHistory.name: History size limit
CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_MaxHistory.tooltip: Max number of generations kept per output module; oldest entries are removed to limit memory use.

CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_Autoplay.name: Autoplay video
CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_Autoplay.tooltip: When off, the main video shows the first frame until you click to play (saves GPU decode when many cards run in parallel).

CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_Muted.name: Videos muted by default
CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_Muted.tooltip: When on, main videos load muted. Note: with autoplay on and sound on, some browsers may block playback per their policies.

CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_ThumbMode.name: High-performance thumbnail mode
CLab_2-PerformanceMedia_ThumbMode.tooltip: When on, grid history loads only the first frame per video to save memory. When off, all grid videos loop muted (better for powerful machines).

CLab_3-FileIO_ArchiveDir.name: Archive folder name
CLab_3-FileIO_ArchiveDir.tooltip: Root folder name where the panel archives captured media and organized files. Do not use slashes or other invalid path characters.

CLab_3-FileIO_KeepTemp.name: Keep original temp files when capturing
CLab_3-FileIO_KeepTemp.tooltip: When off, after moving temp files into the archive folder, the originals are deleted to save disk space.

CLab_3-FileIO_Prefix.name: Output filename prefix
CLab_3-FileIO_Prefix.tooltip: Prefix for filenames when saving captures; default is pix (e.g. pix_01.png).

CLab_4-Automation_HaltOnError.name: Stop queue on error
CLab_4-Automation_HaltOnError.tooltip: When on, any task error clears the entire queue. When off, failed tasks are skipped and later jobs still run.

CLab_5-CardApp_Color.name: Accent color
CLab_5-CardApp_Color.tooltip: Theme color when a task card is selected, and color of the bottom progress bar. Default: #4CAF50

CLab_5-CardApp_Border.name: Border width (px)
CLab_5-CardApp_Border.tooltip: Border thickness when a task card is selected and active.

CLab_5-CardApp_Fill.name: Fill opacity (%)
CLab_5-CardApp_Fill.tooltip: Strength of the highlight fill when a task card is selected.

CLab_5-CardApp_Glow.name: Glow strength
CLab_5-CardApp_Glow.tooltip: Outer glow radius when a task card is selected; max for a strong accent.

CLab_6-ModuleApp_Color.name: Accent color
CLab_6-ModuleApp_Color.tooltip: Primary highlight when an area (input/output) is selected. Default: #2196F3

CLab_6-ModuleApp_Border.name: Border width (px)
CLab_6-ModuleApp_Border.tooltip: Outline thickness when a module is selected.

CLab_6-ModuleApp_Fill.name: Fill opacity (%)
CLab_6-ModuleApp_Fill.tooltip: Strength of the highlight fill when a module is selected (0 = fully transparent).

CLab_6-ModuleApp_Glow.name: Glow strength
CLab_6-ModuleApp_Glow.tooltip: Outer blur radius when a module is selected; set to 0 to disable glow.
